heading: Repealed. , title II, § 202(a),Aug. 27, 1935, ch. 74049 Stat. 877
label: 64a to 64o Repealed. , title II, § 202(a),Aug. 27, 1935, ch. 74049 Stat. 877
notes: Section 64a, , , related to manufacture, sale, and transfer of beer, ale, porter, etc., of not more than 3.2 per centum of alcohol.act Mar. 22, 1933, ch. 4, § 348 Stat. 17
Section 64b, , , related to use of mails for advertisements of beer, ale, porter, etc., of not more than 3.2 per centum of alcohol.act Mar. 22, 1933, ch. 4, § 3(c)48 Stat. 17
Section 64c, , , related to permits to manufacture for sale beer, ale, porter, etc., of not more than 3.2 per centum of alcohol.act Mar. 22, 1933, ch. 4, § 448 Stat. 17

Section 64d, , , related to development of beer, ale, porter, etc., of an alcoholic content in excess of that specified in permit with a proviso that such content will subsequently be reduced to prescribed limit.act Mar. 22, 1933, ch. 4, § 4(b)48 Stat. 18
Section 64e, , , related to exemption from taxation of fortified wines when used for production of non­beverage alcohol.act Mar. 22, 1933, ch. 4, § 4(b)(2)48 Stat. 18
Section 64f, , , related to burden of proof as to alcoholic content of beer, ale, porter, etc.act Mar. 22, 1933, ch. 4, § 4(b)(4)48 Stat. 18
Section 64g, , , related to penalties for unlawful manufacture or sale of beer, ale, porter, etc., under this chapter.act Mar. 22, 1933, ch. 4, § 4(c)48 Stat. 18
Section 64h, , , related to geographical applications of sections 64c to 64g of this title.act Mar. 22, 1933, ch. 4, § 4(d)48 Stat. 19

Section 64i, , , related to requirement that at time of sale any beer, ale, porter, etc., manufactured under this chapter must contain no more than 3.2 per centum of alcohol.act Mar. 22, 1933, ch. 4, § 548 Stat. 19
Section 64j, , , related to prohibition of shipment of beer, ale, porter, etc., of an alcoholic content of 3.2 per centum into dry States.act Mar. 22, 1933, ch. 4, § 648 Stat. 19
Section 64k, , , related to penalties for violation of prohibition of shipment of beer, ale, porter, etc., into dry States.act Mar. 22, 1933, ch. 4, § 748 Stat. 19
Section 64, , , related to penalties and forfeitures incurred prior to effective date of chapter.lact Mar. 22, 1933, ch. 4, § 848 Stat. 19
Section 64m, , , related to effect of chapter on existing legislation with respect to internal revenue laws.act Mar. 22, 1933, ch. 4, § 1(c)48 Stat. 16
Section 64n, , , related to effective date of chapter.act Mar. 22, 1933, ch. 4, § 948 Stat. 19
Section 64, , , provided for a savings clause for provisions of chapter.oact Mar. 22, 1933, ch. 4, § 1048 Stat. 20
